title: Kayven whistler
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Whistler}} {{Species |image= |name=Kayven Whistler |designation= |class=[[Mammal/Legends|Mammal]]''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'' |subspecies= |races= |height= |length=1 [[Meter/Legends|meter]] |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Razored teeth, wings |lifespan= |origin=[[Kayven system/Legends|Kayven system]] |habitat=[[Forest/Legends|Forests]] |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|Something...something's up there."
"That would be the Kayven whistlers. Carnivorous fliers. They live up in the rafters – but occasionally we hoist a treat up to them.|[[Orrin Gault]] and [[Mosep Binneed/Legends|Mosep Binneed]]|[[Kenobi (novel)|''Kenobi'']]}} '''Kayven whistlers''' were vicious carnivorous flying creatures, resembling a cross between a monkey and a [[Bat/Legends|bat]]. The magician [[Xaverri]] created illusions of them in her act, flying over and swooping down at the audience. [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] kept some kayven whistlers as pets at his townhouse and palace and took great delight in feeding his enemies to them. ==Appearances== *[[Kenobi (novel)|''Kenobi'']] {{Ab|Kenobi (audiobook)}} *''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}} *{{StoryCite|story=Play It Again, Figrin D'an: The Tale of Muftak and Kabe|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} *{{JournalCite|11|Spare Parts (short story)|reprint=1}} *{{WEGCite|story=The Passage From Perdition|book=Mos Eisley Adventure Set}} ==Sources== *''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'' *''[[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Planet Tatooine]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Carnivorous creatures]] [[Category:Flying creatures]] [[Category:Mammals]] [[Category:Species of undefined sentience]]
